name: Tropfkrapfen (Drop Donuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar.
2. Stir in egg yolks and whole egg; blend.
3. In a separate bowl, sift all dry ingredients except the confectioners' sugar; add to creamed mixture, alternating with buttermilk. Stir to mix all ingredients.
4. Drop spoonfuls of dough into 375 degree F deep fat.
5. Fry in batches to keep fat temperature constant.
6. Turn to brown on all sides.
7. Drain on paper towels.
8. Sprinkle with confectioners' sugar.
